title: chrysopsis villosa var. fastigiata
intro: Chrysopsis villosa var. fastigiata, commonly known as bushy goldeneye or bushy goldenaster, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysopsis villosa var. fastigiata are said to include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although its use as a medicinal herb has not been extensively scientifically studied.
